ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fans" (
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fan */,
  "fan_name" TEXT /* Name of the fan */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fan */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the fan's account */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fan */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the fan */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the fan registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the fan logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the fan's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raids" (
  "raid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each raid */,
  "raid_name" TEXT /* Name of the raid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the raid */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the raid */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the raid */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan who organized the raid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the raid (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("raid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_raids_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "raid_participants" (
  "raid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan participating in the raid */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the fan joined the raid */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the fan's participation (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("raid_id", "fan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_category" TEXT /* Category of the item */,
  "item_num" INTEGER /* Number of the item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the item's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "fan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fan making the order */,
  "raid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the raid (if applicable) */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item being ordered */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "discount_amount" TEXT /* Discount amount applied to the order */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "shipping_amount" TEXT /* Shipping amount */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the order */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the order has been paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_fan_id FOREIGN KEY ("fan_id") REFERENCES fans ("fan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_raid_id FOREIGN KEY ("raid_id") REFERENCES raids ("raid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_history" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the order status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id", "update_date")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES item_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_quantities" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the quantity was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for inventory management */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, customer service, data analyst) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_prices" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the price was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Discount percentage on the item */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxes" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate on the item */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Tax jurisdiction (e.g., state, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method (e.g., ground, air, express) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_cost" TEXT /* Cost of shipping */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the order was delivered */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., delivered, pending, failed) */,
  "delivery_address" TEXT /* Delivery address */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Delivery method (e.g., in-person, mail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the order was returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return (e.g., defective, incorrect item) */,
  "return_status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "return_tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the return shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)
